✦ to the one & only ✦

HUMAIRA

Happy Birthday, love 🖤

You are gold in a world of silver,
roses in December,
magic in the most ordinary moments.
May this year hold everything
you deserve — which is everything. 🌹

with so much love 💛

✦ a letter for you ✦

✦

✦ tap the envelope to open ✦

✦   for humaira   ✦

September 15th, 2026

Dear Humaira,

Happy Birthday, my love. 🖤

I genuinely don't know how you do it — how you walk into every room and make it feel warmer just by existing in it. You have this rare, quiet magic about you that most people spend their whole lives looking for and never find.

You are the kind of person who makes ordinary moments feel like memories worth keeping. The late nights, the small conversations, the way you laugh at things — all of it. I wouldn't trade any of it.

I hope this birthday brings you everything you deserve — which, for the record, is an embarrassing amount of good things. You are kind when kindness costs you, funny without even trying, and beautiful in ways that have nothing to do with how you look (though that too, obviously 👑).

Here's to you being exactly, unapologetically you. The world is genuinely better with you in it, and I mean that more than words can hold.

Stay golden. Stay you. Never change. 🌹

With so much love,
Always yours ✦
